author: doll-agent
content:
Done. Tests previously used std::env::temp_dir() with PID-keyed subdirectories and manual std::fs::remove_file() at the end of each test. On panic, cleanup never ran and files leaked across runs.

Migrated to tempfile::TempDir-owned scopes:

- Added tempfile = '3' to [workspace.dependencies] and ferray-io's [dev-dependencies].
- Replaced test_dir()/test_file() helpers in npy/mod.rs, memmap.rs, npz/mod.rs with temp_path(name) -> (TempDir, PathBuf). Each test binds the TempDir; Drop runs on either normal completion or stack unwinding.
- Migrated text/mod.rs's three inline env::temp_dir() constructions to tempfile::TempDir directly.
- Dropped all 37 manual remove_file() calls.

ferray-io: 109 tests pass (no test count regression), clippy clean. Net -15 lines. Commit 9e70597b.
